current_read.title: Dario Amodei: "Machines of Loving Grace"
current_read.description: Dario Amodei's essay on what a world transformed by powerful AI could look like — exploring the potential for AI to accelerate scientific progress, eliminate disease, and reshape the economy over the next 5-10 years.

current_listen.title: Dwarkesh Podcast: Why Leonardo was a saboteur, Gutenberg went broke, and Florence was weird (Ada Palmer)
current_listen.description: Ada Palmer (historian, novelist, composer at University of Chicago) on Renaissance history — why great figures of the era were saboteurs, failures, and outcasts before becoming legends. Covers Leonardo, Gutenberg, Medici Florence. You're ~51 min in of 2 hrs.
